Title: Thriller
Description: The sixth studio album by Michael Jackson, featuring hits like 'Billie Jean' and 'Beat It'.

Title: Back In Black
Description: The classic hard rock album by AC/DC, serving as a tribute to vocalist Bon Scott.

Title: The Dark Side of the Moon
Description: A progressive rock concept album by Pink Floyd exploring themes of time, greed, and conflict.

Title: Nevermind
Description: The definitive grunge album by Nirvana that popularized the Seattle sound globally.

Title: Rumours
Description: A landmark pop-rock album by Fleetwood Mac known for its intricate vocal harmonies.

Title: Abbey Road
Description: The final studio recording session by The Beatles, featuring a famous medley on side two.
